message:
🌱 Add vitess: Bug Report: empty ListShardTablet result when remote cell mission (#896)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "vitess-13801-bug-report-empty-listshardtablet-result-when-remote-cell-topology-i",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "vitess: Bug Report: empty ListShardTablet result when remote cell topology is down",
+    "description": "Bug Report: empty ListShardTablet result when remote cell topology is down. Community-reported issue.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify vitess troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your vitess deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n vitess -l app.kubernetes.io/name=vitess\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=vitess -n vitess --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for error: `%v\", err)`"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review vitess configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant vitess configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n vitess -l app.kubernetes.io/name=vitess\nkubectl get configmap -n vitess -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=vitess\n```\n### Overview of the Issue\n\nWhen remote cell topology is unreachable (example: in case of cutting internet cables), `vtctl` binary and `vtctlclient`/`vtctld GRPC api` return different results."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Bug Report: empty ListShardTablet result when remote cell\u2026",
+        "description": "This adds tests to confirm and enforce the correct / expected behavior of the [`vtctldclient GetTablets` client command](https://vitess.io/docs/reference/programs/vtctldclient/vtctldclient_gettablets/) and the [`GetTablets` vtctlserverice.Vtctld\n```yaml\n</details>\n\n\n\n<details>\n  <summary>Unit test results</summary>\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Bug Report: empty ListShardTablet result when\u2026 is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=vitess -n vitess --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n vitess --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that `%v\", err)` no longer appears in logs."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This adds tests to confirm and enforce the correct / expected behavior of the [`vtctldclient GetTablets` client command](https://vitess.io/docs/reference/programs/vtctldclient/vtctldclient_gettablets/) and the [`GetTablets` vtctlserverice.Vtctld RPC](https://github.com/vitessio/vitess/blob/3814b2a602e83641a8f8305ab0ffce9642516e57/proto/vtctlservice.proto#L164-L165) (which the client command",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "</details>\n\n\n\n<details>\n  <summary>Unit test results</summary>",
+        "</details\n\n### Binary Version",
+        "@DeathBorn Here's an example usage:"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
